meta.convention: sheet start date = first payment (origination one month earlier); interest-in-arrears day-weighted 30/360; release at prev-month-end slice, excess to survivors by original proportions; P&I column = escrow
meta.projection: actuals + GL reconciliation through 2026-05; months after 2026-05 (up to 2056-05) are scheduled amortization projections — no new releases, prepays or GL
